title: Halcyon Days
description:
Join Our Discord

Об игреConcept
While exploring ancient ruins, Teflon accidentally releases a mysterious woman and her guardian from their cryosleep. When it's revealed that they are from a lost civilization that shaped the world as it is today, an adventure begins. Explore a vast world and fight your way through dungeons in a story of treasure, betrayal and friendship. 

Key Features

Adventure on a tale of friends and betrayals in the cut throat world of a treasure hunter

Intense and fast paced 3rd person combat

In depth development system of weapons, armors and upgrades

Build your sortie based on what you're able to attain and develop

15 Side Quests

Explore 5 open islands with diverse biomes and characters

Voice acted story scenes

About The Developer

I'm a solo dev who learned unreal to make this game 4 years ago. I started this project 2 and a half years ago, and I didn't know if I'd be able to complete it. I intend on keeping up with bug fixes for at least the next few years as I'm sure people will discover things my game testers did not. Thanks to everyone who plays!
description_short: While exploring ancient ruins, Teflon accidentally releases a mysterious woman and her guardian from their cryosleep. When it's revealed that they are from a lost civilization that shaped the world as it is today, an adventure of treasure, betrayal and friendship begins.
